user.title: Theme Manager Setup
user.description:
Installs the Theme Manager. Preset themes are copied to /config/themes/ and configuration.yaml is updated automatically.

After installation you can pick a theme under **My Account → Appearance → Theme**.

apply_theme.name: Apply Theme
apply_theme.description: Sets the global default theme for this HA instance.

theme_name.name: Theme Name
theme_name.description: Name of the theme as defined in the YAML file (e.g. 'Modern Dark', 'Dracula'). Use 'default' to reset.

reload_themes.name: Reload Themes
reload_themes.description: Reloads all themes from /config/themes/ so newly added files are detected immediately.

list_themes.name: List Themes
list_themes.description: Logs all available theme names from /config/themes/ to the Home Assistant log.
